paper_title: Comprehensive analysis of formin gene family highlights candidate genes related to pollen cytoskeleton and male fertility in wheat (Triticum aestivum L.)

methods.method_name: Phylogenetic and Domain Analysis of TaFHs
methods.description: This method involves constructing a phylogenetic tree and analyzing the domain structure of TaFH genes to understand their evolutionary relationships and functional domains.

steps.description: We adopted the MEGA software to analyze the 25 identified formin genes using an evolutionary tree.
steps.searchable_summary: use MEGA software to construct evolutionary tree for 25 formin genes

steps.description: Based on the information on the phylogenetic relationship, 25 TaFH genes were clustered into 10 groups.
steps.searchable_summary: cluster 25 TaFH genes into 10 groups based on phylogenetic tree

steps.description: The TaFHs structure were obtained and the number of exons and introns were highly divergent.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze exon and intron structure of TaFH genes

methods.description: This method involves modeling the 3D structure of TaFH proteins using homology modeling to explore their structural mechanisms.

steps.description: Eight TaFHs representative proteins were modeled using homology to predict the 3D structure.
steps.searchable_summary: use homology modeling to predict 3D structure of TaFH proteins

steps.description: The Phyre 2 server and PyMDLWin were used to deduce and visualize the 3D structures.
steps.searchable_summary: visualize 3D structures using Phyre 2 and PyMDLWin

methods.description: This method involves scanning the promoter regions of TaFH genes for stress-related cis-regulatory elements to understand their response to stress stimuli.

steps.description: 1.5-kb upstream promoter regions of TaFH genes were scanned for stress-related cis-regulatory elements using the Plant CARE online service.
steps.searchable_summary: scan promoter regions for cis-regulatory elements using Plant CARE
inputs: 1.5-kb upstream promoter regions of TaFH genes

methods.method_name: Expression Analysis of TaFH Genes in Different Tissues
methods.description: This method explores the expression of TaFH genes in different tissues of TGMS wheat line BS366 to understand their role in tissue-specific development.

steps.description: We explored the expression of TaFH genes in different tissues of TGMS wheat line BS366, including the root, stem, leaf, pistil, stamen, and glume.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze expression of TaFH genes in various wheat tissues
